about.title: About
about.heading: Delivering the Finest Gift Boxes for Your Special Moments
about.description: Make every moment memorable with our premium gift boxes. Carefully curated and beautifully packaged, each box is filled with handpicked items designed to impress. Whether it's for a birthday, wedding, or a simple “thank you,” our gift boxes are crafted to leave a lasting impression — because thoughtful gifting starts here.

items.question: What types of gifts do you offer?
items.answer: We offer a wide range of premium gift boxes for all occasions including birthdays, weddings, anniversaries, and more. Each box is carefully curated with handpicked items.

items.question: How long does delivery take?
items.answer: Standard delivery takes 2-3 business days. Express delivery is available for next-day delivery on orders placed before 2 PM.

items.question: Do you offer free delivery?
items.answer: Yes! We offer free delivery on all orders above 120 EGP. For orders below that, a small delivery fee applies.

items.question: Can I customize my gift box?
items.answer: Absolutely! You can personalize your gift box by adding a custom message card. Contact our support team for fully custom orders.

items.question: What is your return policy?
items.answer: We accept returns within 7 days of delivery for damaged or incorrect items. Please contact our support team with photos of the issue.

items.question: How can I track my order?
items.answer: Once your order is shipped, you will receive an email with a tracking number. You can also track your order from your account dashboard.

terms.title: Terms of Using Rose Store
terms.subtitle: This page explains the rules that govern your use of the website and related services.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance
acceptance.text: By using the website, you agree to follow these terms.

accounts.title: 2. Accounts
accounts.text: You are responsible for accurate details and account security.

orders.title: 3. Orders
orders.text: Order confirmation depends on product availability and successful payment.

pricing.title: 4. Pricing
pricing.text: Prices may change and the checkout price is the final applied one.

shipping.title: 5. Shipping
shipping.text: Delivery timelines are estimates and can vary by location and conditions.

returns.title: 6. Returns
returns.text: Returns and exchanges follow the approved store policy.

usage.title: 7. Acceptable Use
usage.text: You must not misuse the website or affect service stability.

updates.title: 8. Updates
updates.text: We may update these terms at any time and publish the latest version here.

privacy.title: Your Privacy Is Safe with Rose
privacy.subtitle: Here is a clear overview of how we handle your data, why we use it, and your rights.

collect.title: What do we collect?
collect.text: Name, email, phone, and shipping address to serve your orders.

why.title: Why do we collect it?
why.text: To improve your experience, process orders, and send updates.

protect.title: How do we protect it?
protect.text: We use suitable safeguards against unauthorized access.

share.title: Who do we share with?
share.text: We never sell data; only essential sharing with payment and shipping.

hero.title: We Believe Every Moment
hero.description: Born from a passion for meaningful gifting, Rose is a team of four developers who built something beautiful together.

mission.subtitle: What drives us
mission.heading: Our Mission & Values
mission.description: We started Rose with one goal: make gifting effortless, beautiful, and personal. Every line of code we write is driven by the belief that a great gift can change someone's day.

values.title: Made with Love
values.desc: Every product is handpicked and every feature is crafted with care for the end user.

values.title: Quality First
values.desc: We never compromise on quality — from the gifts we sell to the code we write.

values.title: Customer Focused
values.desc: Our customers are at the heart of every decision we make as a team.

timeline.event: Rose was founded by four passionate developers.
Launched our first version with 100+ products.

members.bio: Responsible for crafting and delivering the full visual experience of the Rose platform, focusing on building scalable, high-performance, and user-friendly interfaces. Passionate about creating clean, maintainable code and translating design concepts into responsive, pixel-perfect UIs. Pays strong attention to detail, ensuring smooth animations, seamless interactions, and consistent design across all devices and screen sizes.

Responsible for building and maintaining APIs, managing databases, and ensuring high performance and strong security. Focuses on scalable backend architecture while delivering simple and effective user experiences through UI/UX design.

members.name: Member Three
members.bio: Bridges the gap between frontend and backend. Works across the entire stack to deliver seamless features end-to-end.

members.name: Member Four
members.bio: Turns designs into reality. Focuses on user experience, accessibility, and making Rose feel intuitive for every customer.
